rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies two confirmed reuse problems: (1) general-purpose helpers (`map_id`, `map_comp`, `map_antipode`, `antipode_comp`) are all marked `private` in the diff, blocking downstream TauCeti reuse, and (2) `includeRight_apply` is a provable `rfl` tautology duplicating an existing Mathlib `@[simp]` lemma. Review 2 approves and misses both, leaving the PR worse on the reuse dimension.
